@graph.name: Mobile auto detailing
@graph.description: On-location auto detailing including exterior wash, interior cleaning, paint correction, and ceramic coating. We bring water and power to your driveway, office parking lot, or apartment complex.

mainEntity.name: How long does ceramic coating last on a vehicle?

acceptedAnswer.text: A professional ceramic coating typically lasts 2 to 5 years depending on the product layer count, the substrate prep quality, and how the vehicle is maintained. Single-layer consumer-grade coatings last 12 to 18 months; multi-layer professional coatings reach 5 to 7 years with proper maintenance washes every 4 to 6 weeks.

mainEntity.name: What is the difference between a wash and a detail?

acceptedAnswer.text: A wash removes surface dirt and contaminants. A detail is a complete restoration of the vehicle inside and out: hand wash, decontamination (clay bar or iron remover), interior vacuum and surface clean, leather and plastic conditioning, window cleaning inside and out, tire dressing, and a wax or sealant application. A full detail takes 3 to 6 hours; a wash takes 30 to 60 minutes.

mainEntity.name: Do mobile detailers need water and electricity hookup at my location?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most professional mobile detailers bring their own water tank (40 to 100 gallons) and either a battery-powered or generator-powered system. We do not require water or electricity from your location. We do need open space around the vehicle, ideally a flat surface in shade. Apartment complexes, office parking lots, and driveways all work.

mainEntity.name: Can mobile detailers come to apartment complexes or office parking lots?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, with one consideration: some apartment complexes and office parks require a permit or advance notice for any commercial vehicle service. Check with your property manager before booking. We can provide proof of insurance to the property manager if required.

mainEntity.name: How much does mobile auto detailing cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mobile detailing pricing ranges from $89 for a standard exterior wash and wax to $1,295 for a full multi-day paint correction and ceramic coating. The most common service tier is a full interior and exterior detail at $189 to $349 depending on vehicle size and condition. Estimates are typically free over the phone or by photo.
